properties.Steps: - What different fields should be editable and locked in a translation vs original authoring? May vary by xMatter pack. Irrelevant 5.5 onwards

properties.Test Case: Check fields/buttons that should be disabled while translating (e.g. images). Does the toolbox:gear:allow changes switch enable those fields to be edited? Update: this is now the lock icon in the lower left. Irrelevant 5.5 onwards
properties.Steps: - Check fields/buttons that should be disabled while translating (e.g. images). Does the toolbox:gear:allow changes switch  enable those fields to be edited? Update: this is now the lock icon in the lower left. Irrelevant 5.5 onwards

properties.Test Case: Should be able to click to see different source languages (for example, in a derivative of Moon and Cap, a source Bubble shows Tibetan, French, and English. Any of these should be selectable and result in showing source text in that language.
properties.Steps: - Should be able to click to see different source languages (for example, in a derivative of Moon and Cap, a source Bubble shows Tibetan, French, and English. Any of these should be selectable and result in showing source text in that language.

properties.Test Case: If a source language is set as a national language and you choose "two languages" (bilingual mode) it should move from the source bubble to the page
properties.Steps: - If a source language is set as a national language and you choose "two languages" (bilingual mode) it should move from the source bubble to the page

properties.Test Case: Close Bloom. Download a book from Blorg. When download is complete and you click OK, Bloom should open and present that book for translation.
properties.Steps: Close Bloom. Download a book from Blorg. When download is complete and you click OK, Bloom should open and present that book for translation.
